description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat and low-pitched gable roof, featuring a combination of single and two-story sections. The structure is surrounded by a wooden fence and landscaped with green lawns, trees, and a rectangular swimming pool in the backyard. Large floor-to-ceiling windows line the main facade, providing ample natural light and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor spaces. The driveway leads to a two-car garage, and the backyard includes outdoor seating and garden areas. The exterior is finished in light-colored materials, with contrasting darker roofing and wooden accents. The overall design emphasizes open, airy living with a strong connection to the surrounding yard.
description: A modern, light-colored bungalow with a mix of single and two-story sections, large windows, a gable roof, and landscaped yard with a pool and garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, pool, and outdoor seating area.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, pool, and the full extent of the fenced property.
description_view_2: Garage and driveway view, with the main entrance and landscaped front yard visible.
description_view_3: Side view showing the two-story section, backyard, and pool area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on the front and side facades
